title: Expectations Of Stronger Demand In China Pushed Crude Oil Higher
section_path: Expectations Of Stronger Demand In China Pushed Crude Oil Higher
section_path_text: Expectations Of Stronger Demand In China Pushed Crude Oil Higher
summary:
Main
By Daniel Hynes
Signs of improving demand boosted sentiment across commodity markets. This was aided by a reversal in the USD late in the session amid expectations of lower inflation in 2023. Crude oil gained as Saudi Aramco's move to raise prices boosted sentiment.
